form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last over 352m at this track beaten 18 lengths (20.73) behind Gold Alaska in a Grade 5 on March 10. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start was tightened and checked off heels.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (20.25) over 352m at this track. Has a low draw. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 19.72 with a 1.5 lengths win at this track over 352m. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.
